case_title: MERRITT, WILLIE VS GOOD YEAR TIRE & RUBBER COMPANY(WHEELER, DICK)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MERRITT, WILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT GOOD YEAR TIRE & RUBBER COMPANY(WHEELER, DICK) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
